hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】雷·达里奥表示凯文·沃什不应在“滞胀”时代降息；【FINANCE】这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易；【CRYPTO】保罗·都铎·琼斯 (Paul Tudor Jones) 称比特币是“最好的通胀对冲工具”，警告股票估值过高。

items.title: Ray Dalio says Kevin Warsh shouldn't cut interest rates in a ‘stagflation’ era
items.summary: Dalio said that if Kevin Warsh were to cut rates, it would risk damaging confidence in the central bank at a critical moment.
items.title_zh: 雷·达里奥表示凯文·沃什不应在“滞胀”时代降息
items.summary_zh: 达里奥表示，如果凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）降息，可能会在关键时刻损害人们对央行的信心。

items.title: This little-known ETF is up over 600% amid U.S.-Iran war, a better trade than oil or energy stocks
items.summary: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has surged more than 600% since the beginning of the year, vastly outperforming crude oil and energy stocks.
items.title_zh: 这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易
items.summary_zh: 自今年年初以来，Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) 已飙升逾 600%，远远优于原油和能源股。

items.title: Paul Tudor Jones calls bitcoin the 'best inflation hedge,' warns of overvalued stocks
items.summary: It will be "really hard to make money" in stocks over the next decade, said the billionaire investor, noting that the S&P 500's valuation reminds him of the 2000 dot-com bubble.
items.title_zh: 保罗·都铎·琼斯 (Paul Tudor Jones) 称比特币是“最好的通胀对冲工具”，警告股票估值过高
items.summary_zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来十年，股票“真的很难赚钱”，并指出标准普尔 500 指数的估值让他想起了 2000 年的互联网泡沫。

items.title: Here's everything to expect when the Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday
items.summary: In what could be Jerome Powell's final meeting as Fed chair, he and his fellow policymakers are likely to continue their cautious approach.
items.title_zh: 美联储周三发布最新利率决定时，所有值得期待的事情都在这里
items.summary_zh: 这可能是杰罗姆·鲍威尔作为美联储主席的最后一次会议，他和他的政策制定者同行可能会继续采取谨慎的态度。

items.title: Jamie Dimon warns of 'some kind of bond crisis' ahead as global debt risks build
items.summary: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙警告称，随着全球债务风险的加剧，未来将出现“某种债券危机”
items.summary_zh: 戴蒙是全球市值最大的银行摩根大通的负责人，他表示，当今日益增长的风险组合可能会以不可预测的方式结合起来。

items.title: This bank CEO let his AI clone handle an earnings call — now he's signing an OpenAI deal
items.summary: It's part of Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce
items.title_zh: 这位银行首席执行官让他的人工智能克隆人处理财报电话会议——现在他正在签署一项 OpenAI 协议
items.summary_zh: 这是 Customers Bank 首席执行官 Sam Sidhu 努力的一部分，目的是利用人工智能代理作为新的数字劳动力，在行业转型竞赛中取得领先

items.title: Amid Iran War and Tensions with Neighbors, U.A.E. Goes Its Own Way
items.summary: The United Arab Emirates’ decision to leave OPEC has rocked the region, underscoring how the country, at odds with Saudi Arabia, is increasingly charting its own course.
items.title_zh: 在伊朗战争和与邻国的紧张关系中，阿联酋走自己的路
items.summary_zh: 阿拉伯联合酋长国退出欧佩克的决定震惊了该地区，突显出该国与沙特阿拉伯的矛盾越来越多地制定自己的路线。

items.title: Robinhood stock falls 8% after big earnings miss due to weak crypto trading revenue
items.summary: While the trading platform’s crypto revenue tanked 47% to $134 million, a record-breaking surge in prediction market bets helped push overall revenue up 15% to $1.07 billion.
items.title_zh: 由于加密货币交易收入疲软，盈利大幅下滑，Robinhood 股价下跌 8%
items.summary_zh: 尽管该交易平台的加密货币收入下降了 47% 至 1.34 亿美元，但预测市场押注破纪录的激增帮助推动整体收入增长 15% 至 10.7 亿美元。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 在 FedRAMP 中可用
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 可通过 FedRAMP 对 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 OpenAI API 进行中等授权，从而为美国联邦机构提供安全的 AI 采用。

items.title: Bitcoin rises to $77,000 ahead of Fed decision as Trump preps for lengthy Hormuz block
items.summary: Bitcoin is sitting almost still while the rest of the majors give back gains and oil pushes above $111 on reports of an extended U.S. naval blockade against Iran.
items.title_zh: 随着特朗普为漫长的霍尔木兹封锁做准备，比特币在美联储决定之前上涨至 77,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 比特币几乎停滞不前，而其他主要货币则回吐涨幅，油价因美国延长对伊朗海军封锁的报道而升至 111 美元上方。

items.title: Hong Kong warns of fake tokens posing as HSBC’s stablecoin
items.summary: HSBC and Anchorpoint Financial both clarified that they have not launched any stablecoins in Hong Kong, but plan to do so this year.
items.title_zh: 香港警告假冒代币冒充汇丰稳定币
items.summary_zh: 汇丰银行和 Anchorpoint Financial 均澄清，尚未在香港推出任何稳定币，但计划今年推出。

items.title: Strategy-fueled bitcoin rally could last ‘for some time to come,’ Bitwise CIO says
items.summary: Strategy issuing STRC has helped the company accumulate over $7 billion worth of BTC in recent weeks, Bitwise says.
items.title_zh: Bitwise CIO 表示，战略推动的比特币反弹可能会持续“一段时间”
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 表示，最近几周发行 STRC 的策略已帮助该公司积累了价值超过 70 亿美元的 BTC。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Meta shares look 'iffy' into earnings. How to trade it
items.summary: Meta heads into earnings Wednesday after the bell with the fundamentals case largely intact. But the technicals are a bit shaky.
items.title_zh: Meta 股票的盈利看起来“不确定”。如何交易
items.summary_zh: Meta 在周三盘后公布财报，基本面基本完好。但技术上有点不稳定。

items.title: 'Draconian development' in Meta-Manus deal draws the line in China's AI race with the U.S.
items.summary: Beijing's decision to block Meta's acquisition of Manus is a warning to other startups thinking of relocating data, talent and intellectual property abroad.
items.title_zh: Meta-Manus 交易中的“严厉发展”为中国与美国的人工智能竞赛划定了界限
items.summary_zh: 北京方面阻止 Meta 收购 Manus 的决定是对其他考虑将数据、人才和知识产权转移到海外的初创公司的一个警告。

items.title: Bessent defends U.S. dollar swap lines as Iran war harms global finances
items.summary: President Donald Trump, asked on CNBC's "Squawk Box" this week about a possible UAE swap line, appeared to say he is in favor of it.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争损害全球金融，贝森特捍卫美元互换额度
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统本周在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中被问及可能的阿联酋互换额度时，似乎表示他赞成这一做法。

items.title: Faisal Islam: Why the UAE's exit from Opec is a big deal
items.summary: It will have little effect on the current oil blockades, but it could change everything afterwards.
items.title_zh: 费萨尔·伊斯兰：为什么阿联酋退出欧佩克是一件大事
items.summary_zh: 它对当前的石油封锁影响不大，但可能会改变之后的一切。

items.title: Indian billionaire's son offers to save Escobar's hippos
items.summary: Anant Ambani - son of Asia's richest man Mukesh Ambani - says he can take care of the animals roaming free since the drug lord's death.
items.title_zh: 印度亿万富翁的儿子主动提出拯救埃斯科巴的河马
items.summary_zh: 亚洲首富穆克什·安巴尼的儿子阿南特·安巴尼表示，他可以照顾毒枭死后自由活动的动物。

items.title: UAE Says It Will Leave OPEC as Iran War Strains Oil Markets
items.summary: The Gulf government has long complained about the group’s quotas, which officials believe unfairly limited its exports. Its departure is expected to weaken OPEC’s influence.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争令石油市场紧张，阿联酋表示将退出欧佩克
items.summary_zh: 海湾国家政府长期以来一直抱怨该组织的配额，官员认为这不公平地限制了其出口。预计其退出将削弱欧佩克的影响力。

items.title: Afghanistan Accuses Pakistan of Artillery Strike on a University
items.summary: Pakistan, which has been waging an “open war” on its neighbor, did not acknowledge strikes on civilian areas Monday that officials said killed at least four people and wounded about 70 others.
items.title_zh: 阿富汗指责巴基斯坦炮击一所大学
items.summary_zh: 一直在对其邻国发动“公开战争”的巴基斯坦不承认周一对平民区的袭击，官员称此次袭击造成至少四人死亡、约70人受伤。

items.title: Canada proposes ban on crypto ATMs as fraud cases mount
items.summary: Canada's Liberal government calls machines a “primary method” for scams as data and law enforcement link them to rising losses
items.title_zh: 随着欺诈案件增多，加拿大提议禁止加密货币 ATM
items.summary_zh: 加拿大自由党政府称机器是诈骗的“主要手段”，因为数据和执法部门将机器与不断上升的损失联系起来

items.title: Polymarket reportedly seeking CFTC approval to reopen main exchange to U.S. traders
items.summary: If approved, the move would help Polymarket compete with Kalshi in the U.S., and bring more event-trading activity under CFTC regulatory oversight.
items.title_zh: 据报道 Polymarket 正在寻求 CFTC 批准向美国交易者重新开放主要交易所
items.summary_zh: 如果获得批准，此举将有助于 Polymarket 在美国与 Kalshi 竞争，并将更多的事件交易活动置于 CFTC 监管之下。

items.title: Canada moves to ban crypto ATMs, labeling them as ‘primary method’ for fraud
items.summary: The government said it aims to shut down a 'primary method' used by scammers to defraud victims and facilitate money laundering.
items.title_zh: 加拿大采取行动禁止加密货币 ATM，将其标记为欺诈的“主要方法”
items.summary_zh: 政府表示，其目标是关闭诈骗者用来欺骗受害者并促进洗钱的“主要方法”。

items.title: Judge rejects Sam Bankman-Fried’s new trial request, slams claims as ‘wildly conspiratorial’
items.summary: U.S. District Judge Lewis Kaplan declined former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried's request for a new trial. An appeal is still pending.
items.title_zh: 法官拒绝山姆·班克曼-弗里德的新审判请求，猛烈抨击指控为“疯狂的阴谋”
items.summary_zh: 美国地区法官 Lewis Kaplan 拒绝了 FTX 前首席执行官 Sam Bankman-Fried 的重新审判请求。上诉仍在审理中。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #505.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Fluent (BLEND)

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 247 名。

items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #45.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 45 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #85.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pump.fun (PUMP)

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GPT-5.5，这是我们迄今为止最智能的模型，速度更快、功能更强大，专为跨工具编码、研究和数据分析等复杂任务而构建。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Institutional money is coming for bitcoin, but Adam Back says it moves slower than you think
items.summary: The legendary cryptographer discusses institutional money flows into bitcoin.
items.title_zh: 机构资金正在涌入比特币，但 Adam Back 表示比特币的流动速度比你想象的要慢
items.summary_zh: 这位传奇密码学家讨论了机构资金流入比特币的情况。

items.title: Ethereum ICO whale moves $23 million in ETH after 10-year dormancy
items.summary: The Ethereum whale address received the ETH on July 30, 2015, after participating in the ICO event with $3,100.
items.title_zh: 以太坊 ICO 鲸鱼在休眠 10 年后转移了 2300 万美元的 ETH
items.summary_zh: 以太坊鲸鱼地址在参加 ICO 活动后，于 2015 年 7 月 30 日以 3,100 美元收到了 ETH。

items.title: Ostium upgrades backend, adds offchain institutional liquidity providers like Jump
items.summary: Following a major backend overhaul, Ostium pitches itself as a “decentralized execution layer” for global markets.
items.title_zh: Ostium 升级后端，增加了 Jump 等链下机构流动性提供商
items.summary_zh: 在对后端进行重大改革之后，Ostium 将自己定位为全球市场的“去中心化执行层”。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型、Codex 和托管代理来到 AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI GPT 模型、Codex 和托管代理现已在 AWS 上提供，使企业能够在其 AWS 环境中构建安全的 AI。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.title_zh: 我们对社区安全的承诺
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过模型保障、误用检测、策略执行以及与安全专家的协作来保护 ChatGPT 中的社区安全。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.title_zh: Microsoft OpenAI 合作伙伴关系的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和微软宣布了一项修订后的协议，该协议简​​化了合作伙伴关系，增加了长期清晰度，并支持大规模的持续人工智能创新。

items.title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 使用句子变压器训练和微调多模态嵌入和重排序模型

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: OpenAI reportedly missed revenue targets. Shares of Oracle and these chip stocks are falling
items.summary: OpenAI has recently missed its own projections for user growth and revenue, the WSJ reported.
items.title_zh: 据报道 OpenAI 未达到收入目标。甲骨文和这些芯片股的股价正在下跌
items.summary_zh: 据《华尔街日报》报道，OpenAI 最近未能达到自己的用户增长和收入预测。

items.title: Saba Capital finds little appetite for tender offer of shares in Blue Owl, Starwood private credit funds
items.summary: Investors' disinterest in getting liquidity at a steep discount comes amid a quarter that saw elevated redemptions across most private-credit, non-traded BDCs.
items.title_zh: Saba Capital 发现对 Blue Owl 和喜达屋私人信贷基金股份要约收购兴趣不大
items.summary_zh: 投资者对以大幅折扣获得流动性不感兴趣，而此时大多数私人信贷、非交易 BDC 的赎回量都在增加。

items.title: Five takeaways from the King's historic address to Congress
items.summary: There were some lines in the speech that may have buoyed Democrats – and raised eyebrows in the White House.
items.title_zh: 国王向国会发表的历史性讲话的五个要点
items.summary_zh: 演讲中的一些内容可能鼓舞了民主党人 — — 并引起了白宫的不满。

items.title: Comey charged with threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
items.summary: The new case stems from a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director that the justice department says calls for violence against Trump.
items.title_zh: 科米被控在 Instagram 帖子中威胁特朗普生命
items.summary_zh: 新案件源于前联邦调查局局长发布的一张 2025 年贝壳照片，司法部称该照片呼吁对特朗普实施暴力。

items.title: Kim Jong Un praises troops who 'self-blasted' to avoid capture by Ukraine
items.summary: It confirms suspicions that North Korean soldiers are being told to detonate their grenades to kill themselves.
items.title_zh: 金正恩赞扬为避免被乌克兰俘虏而“自爆”的部队
items.summary_zh: 这证实了人们的怀疑，即朝鲜士兵被告知引爆手榴弹自杀。

items.title: Weeks of silence over Iran school strike highly unusual, former US officials say
items.summary: In the two months since the deadly strike, the Pentagon has said only that the incident is under investigation.
items.title_zh: 美国前官员称，伊朗学校罢课事件持续数周保持沉默非常不寻常
items.summary_zh: 在致命袭击发生后的两个月里，五角大楼只表示该事件正在调查中。

items.title: Trump's face to feature on commemorative US passports
items.summary: The passports will be released as part of the 250th anniversary of the US Declaration of Independence.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的头像出现在美国纪念护照上
items.summary_zh: 这些护照将作为美国独立宣言 250 周年纪念活动的一部分而发放。

items.title: Japan zoo staffer allegedly dumps wife's body inside incinerator
items.summary: The zoo has had to delay its reopening after a maintenance break, as police investigate the staff member's claim.
items.title_zh: 日本动物园工作人员涉嫌将妻子尸体扔进焚化炉
items.summary_zh: 由于警方正在调查这名工作人员的说法，动物园在维护中断后不得不推迟重新开放。

items.title: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
items.summary: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 马斯克表示 OpenAI 诉讼中慈善捐赠的基础受到威胁
items.summary_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。

items.title: US regulator to review Disney broadcast licences after Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump
items.summary: The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".
items.title_zh: 吉米·金梅尔拿梅拉尼娅·特朗普开玩笑后，美国监管机构将审查迪士尼的广播许可证
items.summary_zh: 此举出台之际，白宫向迪士尼旗下的美国广播公司施压，要求解雇金梅尔，因为他称梅拉尼娅是“即将成为寡妇的人”。

items.title: Internet Restrictions Spur Russians to Openly Question Putin’s Moves
items.summary: From beauty influencers to the token political opposition, Russians are openly questioning President Vladimir V. Putin’s moves to hamstring access.
items.title_zh: 互联网限制促使俄罗斯人公开质疑普京的举动
items.summary_zh: 从美容影响者到象征性的政治反对派，俄罗斯人公开质疑总统弗拉基米尔·V·普京(Vladimir V. Putin)限制准入的举措。

items.title: The Small U.K. Agency That’s a 911 for Ships in the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: At a military base outside Portsmouth, England, a 24-hour service monitors the Persian Gulf, the Red Sea and part of the Indian Ocean, responding to distress calls.
items.title_zh: 英国一家小型机构，负责为霍尔木兹海峡的船舶提供 911 报警
items.summary_zh: 在英国朴茨茅斯郊外的一个军事基地，有一个 24 小时的服务监视波斯湾、红海和印度洋的部分地区，响应求救信号。

items.title: They Lost Their Homes in Cuba to the Communist Government. Will They Ever Get Them Back?
items.summary: With Cuba in dire economic crisis, people whose properties were seized by its government decades ago say it’s time to resolve thorny compensation claims.
items.title_zh: 他们在古巴的家园被共产党政府夺走了。他们会把它们找回来吗？
items.summary_zh: 由于古巴陷入严重的经济危机，几十年前被政府没收财产的人们表示，现在是解决棘手的赔偿要求的时候了。

items.title: Iraq’s Prime Minister-Designate Thrust Into U.S.-Iran Power Struggle
items.summary: Ali al-Zaidi, a political unknown, has been tasked with forming a new coalition government. Now, he must grapple with growing U.S. pressure to curb Iranian influence over Iraq.
items.title_zh: 伊拉克候任总理介入美伊权力斗争
items.summary_zh: 政治上默默无闻的阿里·扎伊迪的任务是组建新的联合政府。现在，他必须应对美国日益加大的压力，以遏制伊朗对伊拉克的影响。

items.title: Luxury Yacht Linked to Russian Oligarch Passes Through Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The Nord, a 464-foot vessel, appears to be tied to Aleksei A. Mordashov, a Russian steel mogul who is under American and European sanctions.
items.title_zh: 与俄罗斯寡头有关的豪华游艇穿越霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: Nord 号是一艘 464 英尺长的船只，似乎与受到美国和欧洲制裁的俄罗斯钢铁大亨 Aleksei A. Mordashov 有关。

items.title: Prisoner Swap Between Belarus, Poland and Other Nations Frees 10
items.summary: Multiple countries took part in the exchange of prisoners, including a well-known journalist released to Poland, as the Trump administration’s outreach to Belarus continued to pay dividends.
items.title_zh: 白俄罗斯、波兰和其他国家之间的囚犯交换释放了 10 名囚犯

items.title: Mexico Says 4 Foreigners Were at Cartel Raid Where 2 C.I.A. Officers Died
items.summary: Mexican officials revealed that four foreigners — not two — were present during a counterdrug operation in northern Mexico where a crash killed two men later identified as C.I.A. officers.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥称 4 名外国人参与了卡特尔袭击，其中 2 名中情局成员军官死亡

items.title: XRP falls to $1.38 after breaking below $1.40 on rising selling pressure
items.summary: High-volume move flips support into resistance, leaving price stuck at a key decision level.

items.summary_zh: 成交量大幅波动将支撑位转变为阻力位，使价格陷入关键决策水平。

items.title: CFTC sues Wisconsin in agency's legal campaign defending prediction markets authority

items.title: World Cup fever: Chiliz expands to Solana and Base to supercharge fan token trading
items.summary: Chiliz rolled out its own layer-1 network in 2023 to host the trading of its tokens, but is transitioning to what it calls "omnichain distribution."

items.summary_zh: Syndicate 团队表示，正在与安全公司一起调查这一事件，并探索“让人们完整”的选择。

items.title: Pump.fun burns $370 million in PUMP token, commits 50% of future revenue for buyback-burn program
items.summary: The remaining 50% will be used to make 'big bets' to grow the platform in the coming five to 10 years, co-founder Alon Cohen said.
items.title_zh: Pump.fun 销毁了 3.7 亿美元的 PUMP 代币，承诺将未来收入的 50% 用于回购销毁计划

items.title: Robinhood’s Q1 crypto revenue and trading volume fall nearly 50%
items.summary: The company reported a 7% year-over-year increase in transaction revenues, posting a total of $623 million for the quarter.
